comments.body:
Hi @hakandilek, thanks a lot for contributing!

Would you sign the commit (e.g., `git commit --amend -s`)? Note that the commit does not fix #621, which refers to building the image locally. The problem of 621 is that it's using go 1.8 which we don't support anymore.

> Note that the commit does not fix #621, which refers to building the image locally. The problem of 621 is that it's using go 1.8 which we don't support anymore.

Sorry, it actually does. The example in #621 actually builds in the container.

> Sorry, it actually does. The example in #621 actually builds in the container.

yes ubuntu 18.10 delivers go 1.10 as default golang package:
https://packages.ubuntu.com/cosmic/golang

if you prefer, I can also update the script to install 1.12.
